attendance.subtitle: Log your shift hours and manage active time entries
attendance.tipBody: Your location is checked against the shift's site when you clock in or out — make sure location access is allowed so the map can confirm you're on-site.
attendance.todaysShiftClockIn: Today's shift — clock in when you're ready
attendance.callOutHelp: This immediately removes you from the shift, puts it back on the marketplace, and notifies your admin.
attendance.selectShiftToClockIn: Select one of your shifts to clock in
attendance.gpsOptionalNote: Use GPS for on-site punches or manual for standard workflows.

attendance.trackSubmittedRequests: Track your submitted requests and their status

payroll.reviewHoursNote: Review your approved hours, estimated gross pay, deductions, and timecard exceptions.
payroll.previewNote: This is a preview from InnovaShift time entries. Final payroll may change after admin approval and payroll export.

pto.title: PTO Requests
pto.heroSubtitle: Approve PTO, sick, and unpaid leave, keep accrual balances current, and send approved paid leave into payroll.
pto.noRequestsMatch: No PTO requests match the selected filters.
pto.rule1: PTO and Sick approvals reduce the matching accrual balance and create a ledger entry.
pto.rule2: Approved paid PTO/Sick requests appear in payroll as leave earnings.
pto.rule3: Unpaid leave remains visible for scheduling history but does not add gross pay.

adminPayroll.title: Payroll
adminPayroll.subtitle: Review staff hours, gross pay, exceptions, and export payroll-ready totals.
adminPayroll.noExceptionsNote: No pending payroll exceptions in this period.
adminPayroll.exceptionsNote: {{count}} row(s) have pending or rejected corrections.
adminPayroll.noPayrollRows: No payroll rows found for this period.

onboarding.title: Get Ready for Work
onboarding.subtitle: Finish the records your organization needs for scheduling, timekeeping, payroll, and compliance.
onboarding.step1Desc: Name, phone, address, emergency contact, department, and work location.
onboarding.step2Desc: Upload identity, clinical license, certification, or required compliance documents.
onboarding.step3Desc: Confirm W-4/W-2 preferences, dependents, and payroll details.
onboarding.step4Desc: Confirm assigned shifts, availability, and marketplace opportunities.
onboarding.step5Desc: Review available balances and submit time-off requests when needed.
onboarding.step6Desc: Keep approvals, payroll messages, shift changes, and admin alerts current.

availability.title: My Availability
availability.subtitle: Tell your scheduler which days and times you can work — especially useful if you're PRN/on-call, since your admin and the AI Copilot use this to fill open shifts.
availability.missingAccountContext: Missing account context. Sign in again or contact your administrator.
availability.addAvailabilitySub: Submit a date and time window you're free to work
availability.noAvailabilitySubmitted: No availability submitted yet. Add a date on the left to let your scheduler know when you can work.
availability.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.

accruals.title: My Accruals
accruals.subtitle: Review real balances, request time off, and track manager decisions.
accruals.missingStaffContext: Missing staff context. Sign in again or contact your administrator.
accruals.noLedgerEntries: No accrual ledger entries published yet.
accruals.selectDatesHours: Select dates and valid hours before submitting.
accruals.endAfterStartDate: End date must be after the start date.
accruals.requestSent: Time-off request sent to manager review.

shiftChat.subtitle: Direct conversation between staff and management for each shift
shiftChat.noShiftsFound: No assigned or managed shifts found.
shiftChat.startConversation: Start the shift conversation with your team.

shiftChat.selectShiftPrompt: Select a shift on the left to open live chat.
shiftChat.selectShiftRequired: Select a shift before sending a message.

notifications.deleteHint: Deleted notifications are removed from this list right away and permanently erased after {{days}} days.
notifications.selectToReview: Select a notification to review details.
notifications.pushEnabled: Push notifications enabled — you'll be alerted when a matching shift opens up.
notifications.pushEnableFailed: Could not enable push notifications. Check that notification permission is allowed for this app.

documents.title: My Documents
documents.subtitle: Payroll, tax, identity, and employment records in one place.
documents.completionComplete: Your profile is complete for payroll and workforce workflows.
documents.completionNeedsAttention: Your profile is mostly complete. Review the missing records below.

documents.tile6Sub: PTO, sick balance, and request history

theme.oceanDesc: Clear navy and light surfaces for daily operations.
theme.lightDesc: Bright workspace with maximum table readability.
theme.darkDesc: Accessible dark mode with slate panels.
theme.emeraldDesc: Calm green accent for clinical teams.

settings.title: My Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal profile, security, and preferences
settings.appearanceSub: Customize the look and feel of your workspace
settings.passwordMockMsg: Password update flow would trigger here. (Requires Firebase Reauthentication in production)

profile.personalInfoSub: Contact information visible to your organization.
profile.teamSub: Manager, emergency contact, and organization identity.
profile.addressSub: Used for payroll documents and employment records.
profile.taxFormsSub: W-4 withholding preferences and W-2 delivery settings.
profile.w4CertifyText: I certify this withholding information is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
profile.w2ConsentText: I consent to receive W-2 documents electronically where legally allowed.
profile.taxFormsNote: Final tax forms should be generated by authorized payroll or tax systems. InnovaShift stores staff preferences for payroll preparation.
profile.directDepositSub: Bank details used so your pay can be deposited. Only you and payroll admin/HR can see this.
profile.noDdOnFile: No direct deposit account on file yet.
profile.ddNote: This is stored for payroll's reference and is not shared beyond you and payroll admin/HR. InnovaShift does not move funds itself — your organization sets up the actual transfer with this information.
profile.dependentsSub: Dependents used for benefits and tax withholding preparation.
profile.userPreferencesSub: Accessibility, analytics, and local time zone.
profile.securitySub: Protect this app on this device with Face ID / Fingerprint.
profile.twoFactorSub: Require a code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) when signing in.
profile.tfaEnabledSub: An authenticator app code is required at sign-in.
profile.tfaOffSub: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
profile.scanQrHint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the key manually.
profile.enterCodeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
profile.tfaDisableHint: Two-factor authentication will no longer be required at sign-in.
profile.bankFieldsRequired: Bank name, routing number, and account number are required.
profile.accountNumbersMismatch: Account number and confirmation do not match.
profile.ddSaveFailed: Failed to save direct deposit account.
profile.invalidCode: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.
profile.lockEnabledToast: Face ID / Fingerprint unlock enabled for this device.
profile.lockEnableFailed: Could not enable biometric unlock. Check that biometrics are set up on this device.
profile.lockDisabled: Biometric unlock disabled for this device.

marketplace.title: Open Shifts
marketplace.subtitle: Find available shifts, claim extra hours, and manage switch requests.
marketplace.tipBody: Shifts are sorted for you — "Great fit" ones match your role with no schedule conflict, while shifts with a conflict or tight turnaround sink lower and are flagged, not hidden.
marketplace.tryAnother: Try another role, search term, or week.
marketplace.requestsWillAppear: Your cover and trade requests will appear here.
marketplace.newUpdatesAppear: New shift updates will appear here.
marketplace.quickApprovalsSub: Manager review for pending cover and trade requests.
marketplace.notificationLinkUsed: That notification link was already used.
marketplace.claimFromNotificationFailed: Unable to claim that shift from the notification — it may no longer be available.
marketplace.openShiftsLoadFailed: Open shifts could not be loaded. Ask an administrator to deploy the latest Firestore indexes.
marketplace.swapRequestsLoadFailed: Shift switch requests could not be loaded.

scheduler.title: All-in-One Workforce Calendar
scheduler.subtitle: Scheduling, attendance, timesheets, communication, and insights in one place.
scheduler.tipBody: Click any shift to open its actions — assign, publish, or cancel. Use "Create Shift" above to add a new one, and the filters below to focus on a location or role.
scheduler.footerHint: Click a shift for actions. Drag range to create. Drag & drop to reschedule.
scheduler.validTimeRangeRequired: Please provide valid Start and End times.
scheduler.endBeforeStart: End time cannot be before start time.

landing.heroSub: INNOVASHIFT unifies scheduling, shift marketplace, attendance tracking, and admin analytics into one powerful platform — built for modern healthcare.
landing.shiftsH2: Open shifts filled in real time
landing.shiftsBody: Post open shifts to a live marketplace. Employees browse available opportunities, submit swap requests, and get instant notifications — eliminating manual back-and-forth.
landing.timesheetsBody: GPS-verified clock in/out, automated timesheet generation, manager approvals, and one-click payroll-ready exports. Full compliance, zero headaches.
landing.multisiteBody: Manage multiple sites, departments, and thousands of employees from a single dashboard. Each organization is fully isolated — secure, scalable multi-tenant SaaS.
landing.leaveBody: Employees submit leave requests in seconds. Managers review, approve, or decline with a tap. Leave balances update automatically and sync with the scheduler.
landing.ctaSub: Join 150+ healthcare organizations already running on INNOVASHIFT.

publicFeatures.sub: From the moment a shift is created to the moment payroll exports — INNOVASHIFT has every step covered.
publicFeatures.bottomCtaH2: Ready to see it in action?
publicFeatures.f1Desc: Post open shifts to a live marketplace. Employees browse and claim shifts that fit their availability — no more manual assignment chaos.
publicFeatures.f2Desc: Drag-and-drop visual scheduler with conflict detection, overtime alerts, and automated notifications sent directly to staff.
publicFeatures.f3Desc: GPS-verified clock in/out, automated timesheet generation, time correction requests with manager approval workflow.
publicFeatures.f4Desc: Built-in in-app messaging with read receipts, push notifications, and threaded conversations to keep your team aligned.
publicFeatures.f5Desc: Live dashboards showing attendance rates, shift coverage, labor cost trends, and compliance reports — export-ready.
publicFeatures.f6Desc: Each organization is fully isolated with its own data space, roles, and configuration. Scale from 10 to 10,000 employees.
publicFeatures.f7Desc: Configurable push, email and in-app alerts for shift changes, overtime warnings, clock-in reminders and approvals.
publicFeatures.f8Desc: Granular permission system: Super Admin, Org Admin, Scheduler, Manager, HR, and Staff — each with tailored access.
publicFeatures.f9Desc: Firebase Authentication, JWT-secured APIs, Firestore security rules, and full audit logging on every sensitive action.

publicPricing.sub: No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
publicPricing.faqSub: Our team is happy to walk you through the right plan for your organization.
publicPricing.starterDesc: Perfect for small clinics and care homes getting started.
publicPricing.proDesc: Everything in Starter plus advanced tools for growing teams.
publicPricing.enterpriseDesc: Tailored solutions for large healthcare networks.

publicContact.sub: Fill out the form and our team will reach out within one business day to schedule your personalized demo.
publicContact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your scheduling challenges...
publicContact.successSubPre: Thanks! Our team will reach out to
